message:
fix(mux): fix file upload by adding UPLOAD_FILE_LIST protocol message

Uploads were broken because the server's handleFileData checked
file_index against an empty session.files list (only populated for
downloads). Added UPLOAD_FILE_LIST (0x25) message so the client sends
its file list to the server before uploading data. Also added upload
progress tracking via onTransferStart and onDownloadProgress callbacks.

files.patch:
@@ -74,10 +74,11 @@ export const TransferMsgType = {
   FILE_DATA: 0x22,
   TRANSFER_RESUME: 0x23,
   TRANSFER_CANCEL: 0x24,
+  UPLOAD_FILE_LIST: 0x25,
   // Client -> Server (sync/rsync)
-  SYNC_REQUEST: 0x25,
-  BLOCK_CHECKSUMS: 0x26,
-  SYNC_ACK: 0x27,
+  SYNC_REQUEST: 0x26,
+  BLOCK_CHECKSUMS: 0x27,
+  SYNC_ACK: 0x28,
   // Server -> Client
   TRANSFER_READY: 0x30,
   FILE_LIST: 0x31,
